hooks.command: cd /Users/Roberdan/GitHub/convergio/daemon && CHANGED="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH" && case "$CHANGED" in *.rs) CRATE=$(echo "$CHANGED" | sed -n 's|.*/crates/\([^/]*\)/.*|\1|p') && if [ -n "$CRATE" ]; then cargo clippy -p "$CRATE" -- -D warnings 2>&1; else cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings 2>&1; fi ;; esac
